lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have another ring?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Hatius Cosaintus
lines.text: I am Hatius Cosaintus, the taskmaster for the Lumbridge & Draynor Achievement Diary.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is the Achievement Diary?

lines.speaker: Hatius Cosaintus
lines.text: It's a diary that helps you keep track of particular achievements. In the Lumbridge and Draynor area it can help you discover some quite useful things. Eventually, with enough exploration, the inhabitants will

lines.speaker: Hatius Cosaintus
lines.text: reward you.

lines.speaker: Hatius Cosaintus
lines.text: You can see the list of tasks on the side-panel.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a question about my Achievement diary.

lines.speaker: Hatius Cosaintus
lines.text: Well, there are four different Explorer's rings, which match up with the four levels of difficulty. Each has the same rewards as the previous level and some additional benefits too... which tier of rewards would you like to

lines.speaker: Hatius Cosaintus
lines.text: know more about?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Easy rewards please!

lines.speaker: Hatius Cosaintus
lines.text: If you complete all of the easy tasks in Lumbridge and Draynor, your ring can recharge half of your run energy twice per day and cast low level alchemy without runes 30 times per day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Medium rewards please!

lines.speaker: Hatius Cosaintus
lines.text: In addition to the easy rewards, your ring can restore half of your run energy and teleport you to the Draynor cabbage patch three times per day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Hard rewards please!

lines.speaker: Hatius Cosaintus
lines.text: In addition to the easy and medium benefits, the ring will have unlimited cabbage teleports and four charges to restore half your run energy. Collecting Tears of Guthix will provide increased experience.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Elite rewards please!

lines.speaker: Hatius Cosaintus
lines.text: In addition to the previous tiers of rewards, you can block an additional slayer target with slayer masters, recharge all of your run energy three times per day and cast high level alchemy thirty times per day. The

lines.speaker: Hatius Cosaintus
lines.text: Culinaromancer's chest is 20% cheaper, you can use Fairy rings without needing a dramen or lunar staff and you'll receive double wire when thieving in Dorgesh-Kaan.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I claim the rewards?

lines.speaker: Hatius Cosaintus
lines.text: One should complete the tasks in Lumbridge and Draynor so they're ticked off, then speak to me to be rewarded.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Hatius Cosaintus
lines.text: Toodles.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the easy tasks in my Lumbridge & Draynor Achievement Diary!

lines.speaker: Hatius Cosaintus
lines.text: Quite... You'll be wanting a reward then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Hatius Cosaintus
lines.text: This ring is a symbol of your exploration of Lumbridge and Draynor. It can recharge half of your run energy twice per day and cast low level alchemy without runes 30 times per day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Hatius Cosaintus
lines.text: If you ever lose your ring, come back to me to reclaim it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the medium tasks in my Lumbridge & Draynor achievement diary!

lines.speaker: Hatius Cosaintus
lines.text: Quite... You'll be wanting a reward then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Hatius Cosaintus
lines.text: I've upgraded your Explorer's ring for you. It can restore half of your run energy and teleport you to the Draynor cabbage patch three times per day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the hard tasks in my Lumbridge & Draynor achievement diary!

lines.speaker: Hatius Cosaintus
lines.text: Quite... You'll be wanting a reward then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Hatius Cosaintus
lines.text: I've upgraded your Explorer's ring for you. It now has unlimited cabbage teleports and four charges to restore half your run energy. Collecting Tears of Guthix will now provide increased experience.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the elite tasks in my Lumbridge & Draynor achievement diary!

lines.speaker: Hatius Cosaintus
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You've completed all of the tasks in the Lumbridge & Draynor diary! You've earned another reward.

lines.speaker: Hatius Cosaintus
lines.text: I've upgraded your Explorer's ring for you. In addition to the previous benefits you can now block an additional slayer target with slayer masters, recharge all of your run energy three times per day and cast high

lines.speaker: Hatius Cosaintus
lines.text: level alchemy thirty times per day. The Culinaromancer's chest is now 20% cheaper and you'll receive double wire when thieving in Dorgesh-Kaan.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!
